global.description: The ad features a bright green background with a prominent cashback offer and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting cashback offers with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A circular shape with a transparent fill, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Cashback offer text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Earn cashback daily' with a smaller line below it saying 'No hidden fees', set against a bright background.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily No hidden fees

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: The word 'ClearLedger' displayed in a prominent, bold font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Book now' in white, set against a contrasting background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, cashback offer, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the body text in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Earn cashback daily, No hidden fees, ClearLedger, Book now
